message:
feat(ux): Add fade transitions when filter results change

- Add AnimatePresence with popLayout mode for smooth transitions
- Implement staggered fade animations for grid items
- Create useReducedMotion hook for WCAG 2.3.3 compliance
- Cards fade out when removed and fade in when added
- Layout animations for smooth position changes
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion user preference

Addresses bead jeffreysprompts.com-f7wf
